references.hebrew: וְהָאָ֗רֶץ הָיְתָ֥ה תֹ֙הוּ֙ וָבֹ֔הוּ וְחֹ֖שֶׁךְ עַל־פְּנֵ֣י תְה֑וֹם וְר֣וּחַ אֱלֹהִ֔ים מְרַחֶ֖פֶת עַל־פְּנֵ֥י הַמָּֽיִם׃
references.english: the earth being unformed and void, with darkness over the surface of the deep and a wind fromba wind from In contrast to others “the spirit of.” God sweeping over the water—
references.matched_snippet: ורוח אלהים מרחפת על פני המים

commentary_links.hebrew: וְיַ֤יִן ׀ יְשַׂמַּ֬ח לְֽבַב־אֱנ֗וֹשׁ לְהַצְהִ֣יל פָּנִ֣ים מִשָּׁ֑מֶן וְ֝לֶ֗חֶם לְֽבַב־אֱנ֥וֹשׁ יִסְעָֽד׃
commentary_links.english:
wine that cheers human hearts,
oil that makes the face shine,coil that makes the face shine Lit. “to make the face shine from oil.”
and bread that sustains human life.
commentary_links.matched_snippet: וסימנך ויין ישמח לבב אנוש לרוחא במיא

commentary_links.hebrew: וַֽיְהִי־ה֗וּא טֶ֘רֶם֮ כִּלָּ֣ה לְדַבֵּר֒ וְהִנֵּ֧ה רִבְקָ֣ה יֹצֵ֗את אֲשֶׁ֤ר יֻלְּדָה֙ לִבְתוּאֵ֣ל בֶּן־מִלְכָּ֔ה אֵ֥שֶׁת נָח֖וֹר אֲחִ֣י אַבְרָהָ֑ם וְכַדָּ֖הּ עַל־שִׁכְמָֽהּ׃
commentary_links.english: He had scarcely finished speaking, when Rebekah, who was born to Bethuel, the son of Milcah the wife of Abraham’s brother Nahor, came out with her jar on her shoulder.
commentary_links.matched_snippet: לכודא בשיכרא וסימנך וכדה על שכמה
